messages.content: How do I set up a new Python project with UV?

To set up a new Python project with UV:

1. Install UV: `curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh`
2. Create a new project: `uv init my-project && cd my-project`
3. Add dependencies: `uv add requests`
4. Run your code: `uv run python main.py`

UV handles virtual environment creation automatically.
How do I configure linting with Ruff?

To configure Ruff in your project:

1. Add Ruff as a dev dependency: `uv add --dev ruff`
2. In `pyproject.toml` add:
```toml
[tool.ruff]
line-length = 88

[tool.ruff.lint]
select = ["E", "F", "I"]
```
3. Run checks: `uv run ruff check .`
4. Auto-fix: `uv run ruff check --fix .`

tags: import/title/Setting up a Python project with UV and Ruff
